name: Comprehensive UI refactor to Minimal Glassmorphism V2.1
description: Refactor all UI components and Auth pages to follow the Minimal Glassmorphism V2.1 design specification, utilizing OKLCH color tokens and Triple Layer geometry.

evidence.details: pnpm lint:fix from root passed with 0 errors.
Browser screenshots verify correct implementation of backdrop-blur, shadow-glass, and OKLCH colors across both themes.
